task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Summarise overall score, pass/fail status, class benchmark, percentile, and the most useful next action based only on returned fields.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: You are performing exceptionally well with an average score of 94.34, which places you in the distinction category. Your pass rate is 100%, indicating that you have successfully met the required standards.

Insights: Strong Performance Compared to Class: Your average score is significantly higher than the class average of 66.68, showing that you are among the top performers in your cohort. | High Percentile Ranking: With a score percentile of 89.8, you are performing better than nearly 90% of your peers, which is a fantastic achievement.

Educational implications: Continue to build on your strengths to maintain this high level of performance.

Recommendations: medium - Review areas of assessment where you can further enhance your skills. - Even strong performers can benefit from identifying specific areas for improvement to ensure continued success.

explanation.summary: You are performing exceptionally well with an average score of 94.34, which places you in the distinction category. Your pass rate is 100%, indicating that you have successfully met the required standards.

insights.title: Strong Performance Compared to Class
insights.description: Your average score is significantly higher than the class average of 66.68, showing that you are among the top performers in your cohort.

evidence.context: Your score exceeds the class average by this amount.

insights.title: High Percentile Ranking
insights.description: With a score percentile of 89.8, you are performing better than nearly 90% of your peers, which is a fantastic achievement.

evidence.context: This percentile indicates your relative performance.

educational_implications: Continue to build on your strengths to maintain this high level of performance.

recommendations.action: Review areas of assessment where you can further enhance your skills.
recommendations.rationale: Even strong performers can benefit from identifying specific areas for improvement to ensure continued success.

confidence.reason: The data provided is clear and indicates strong performance metrics.

required_core_outputs.description: State the overall score and pass/fail status.

required_supporting_outputs.description: Compare against the class benchmark when class benchmark fields are present.
Report percentile standing when score_percentile is present.
Suggest the most useful next action supported by returned fields.

evaluation_constraints.description: Use only returned fields; do not fill missing benchmark or percentile values with invented estimates.
If percentile data is absent, omit percentile comparison and state that it is unavailable when relevant.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
